violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2024

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of biofilm and soil residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2024
Canned beverages observed stored inside the ice machine buried in ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonia sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/24/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the door tracks of the beer cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2024
